channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Biweekly / Decision makers
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Decision makers (Biweekly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #1 — March 2 to March 16, 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: The past two weeks confirm GitHub Copilot's evolution from coding assistant to enterprise AI platform. With 60 million code reviews reached, a new SDK for embedding agentic execution into any application, and a published security architecture for AI agent workflows, GitHub is building the infrastructure layer for AI-powered software development at scale.
